sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ الْمَثَلُ: «كَلِمَةٌ فِي وَقْتِهَا تُسَاوِي ذَهَبًا».
sentences.translation: Poslovica kaže: «Riječ u pravo vrijeme vrijedi zlata».
sentences.translationEn: The proverb says: «A word at the right time is worth gold».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الْكَلِمَةَ الْمُنَاسِبَةَ فِي الْوَقْتِ الْمُنَاسِبِ مُهِمَّةٌ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: To znači da je prava riječ u pravo vrijeme veoma važna.
sentences.translationEn: This means that the right word at the right time is very important.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ صَدِيقُهُ حَزِينًا فَقَالَ لَهُ: «أَنَا هُنَا مَعَكَ».
sentences.translation: Njegov prijatelj je bio tužan pa mu je rekao: «Ja sam tu uz tebe».
sentences.translationEn: His friend was sad so he said to him: «I am here with you».

sentences.arabic: شَعَرَ الصَّدِيقُ بِالرَّاحَةِ بَعْدَ سَمَاعِ هَذِهِ الْكَلِمَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Prijatelj se osjetio smireno nakon što je čuo te riječi.
sentences.translationEn: The friend felt comforted after hearing those words.
